kali.description: Kali Linux security tools — community MCP server adapted for blhackbox (50+ tools). Connects via SSE to docker compose service on port 9001.

metasploit.description: Metasploit Framework MCP Server — exploit lifecycle management (13+ tools via MSF RPC)

wireshark.description: WireMCP Server — Wireshark/tshark for packet capture and network analysis (7 tools)

screenshot.description: Screenshot MCP Server — headless Chromium screenshots for bug bounty PoC evidence capture (4 tools)

hexstrike.description: HexStrike AI MCP Server — github.com/0x4m4/hexstrike-ai (150+ tools, 12+ security execution agents)

blhackbox-aggregator.description: blhackbox custom aggregator MCP server — NOT an official Ollama product. Orchestrates local Ollama preprocessing agents to clean raw pentest data before Claude analysis.

blhackbox.description: blhackbox core MCP server — recon, tool execution, graph queries, report generation
